name: Project Automation

on:
  issues:
    types: [opened, labeled, closed, reopened]
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, labeled, review_requested, closed]

jobs:
  update-project:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      issues: write
      pull-requests: write
      projects: write
    steps:
      - name: Update project status
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const { context, github } = require('@actions/github');

            // Replace with your org/user and project number
            const owner = context.repo.owner;
            const repo = context.repo.repo;
            const projectNumber = 4; // adjust to your project number

            // GraphQL query to get project ID and fields
            const projectQuery = `
              query($org: String!, $number: Int!) {
                organization(login: $org) {
                  projectV2(number: $number) {
                    id
                    fields(first: 20) {
                      nodes {
                        id
                        name
                        dataType
                        ... on ProjectV2SingleSelectField {
                          options {
                            id
                            name
                          }
                        }
                      }
                    }
                  }
                }
              }
            `;

            const projectData = await github.graphql(projectQuery, {
              org: owner,
              number: projectNumber
            });

            const project = projectData.organization.projectV2;
            const statusField = project.fields.nodes.find(f => f.name === "Status");

            // Helper to set status
            async function setStatus(itemId, statusName) {
              const option = statusField.options.find(o => o.name === statusName);
              if (!option) {
                console.log(`Status option ${statusName} not found`);
                return;
              }
              await github.graphql(`
                mutation($project: ID!, $item: ID!, $field: ID!, $option: String!) {
                  updateProjectV2ItemFieldValue(
                    input: {
                      projectId: $project
                      itemId: $item
                      fieldId: $field
                      value: { singleSelectOptionId: $option }
                    }
                  ) {
                    projectV2Item { id }
                  }
                }
              `, {
                project: project.id,
                item: itemId,
                field: statusField.id,
                option: option.id
              });
            }

            // Determine item type
            let itemId;
            if (context.eventName === "issues") {
              itemId = context.payload.issue.node_id;
              if (context.payload.action === "opened") {
                await setStatus(itemId, "Backlog");
              }
              if (context.payload.action === "labeled") {
                const labels = context.payload.issue.labels.map(l => l.name);
                if (labels.includes("design")) await setStatus(itemId, "Design");
                if (labels.includes("feature") || labels.includes("bug")) await setStatus(itemId, "Development");
              }
              if (context.payload.action === "closed") {
                await setStatus(itemId, "Done");
              }
            }

            if (context.eventName === "pull_request") {
              itemId = context.payload.pull_request.node_id;
              if (context.payload.action === "opened") {
                await setStatus(itemId, "Review");
              }
              if (context.payload.action === "closed" && context.payload.pull_request.merged) {
                await setStatus(itemId, "QA");
              }
            }
